title: ficus andamanica
intro: Ficus andamanica is a species of fig tree native to the Andaman and Nicobar Islands in the Bay of Bengal. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ficus andamanica include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Ficus andamanica include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
